de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SolverCommunication

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SolverCommunication

  • public class SolverCommunication
extends Object
    Stores the communication between KeY and an external solver: Contains a list that stores the messages that has been sent from the solver to KeY and vice versa. Further, it also contains the final result of the solver.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  SolverCommunication.Message 
      static class  SolverCommunication.MessageType
      The message type depends on the channel which was used for sending the message.

      • getMessages

        public Iterable<String> getMessages()
        Returns all messages that were sent between KeY and the solver.

      • getExceptions

        public Iterable<Throwable> getExceptions()
        Call this method only if you are sure that there are no other threads accessing it. It is not thread safe, but it is designed for belated analysis.
        Returns:

        public int getState()
        Returns the current state of the communication. The states are defined by the solver classes.
